arts.ttl: Manchester City’s first offer for player considered ‘low’ – Second bid incoming, club in no rush to sell
arts.sum: Manchester City’s offer for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis is considered ‘low’ at this moment in time because it’s not clear what is fixed and what will be bonuses. That’s according to journalist André Hernan who reports that the bid from Manchester City for the youngster is very much a ‘first offer’. The Premier League champions The post Manchester City’s first offer for player considered ‘low’ – Second bid incoming, club in no rush to sell appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Salford City: FA Cup third round – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 5.45pm GMT kick-off at the Etihad Get in touch! Share your thoughts in an email to Rob Hello and welcome to live coverage of Manchester City v Salford City in the FA Cup third round. Nobody of sound mind could accuse Pep Guardiola of turning his nose up at domestic cup competitions; he’s won 10 of them, 16 if you include the Community Shield and Supercopa de España. This season, however, he needs the FA Cup more than ever. City are out of the Carabao Cup and almost certainly out of the title race. They’re also 22nd in the Champions League, a sentence that is weird on all kinds of levels. City will expect to reach the fourth round but their opponents might take some breaking down. This is surely the best team in Salford City’s short history. They are third in League Two and on a run of six straight wins without conceding a goal. The Class of 92’s involvement adds another narrative layer to tonight’s game. Gary Neville once gave Paul Scholes a big smacker when he scored an injury-time winner on this ground. The mind boggles at how they might celebrate if Salford pull of a shock tonight. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Salford City - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as League Two side travel to the Etihad plus updates from the other Saturday evening fixtures
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Manchester City host League Two side Salford City at the Etihad in the third round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola gives next job update in subtle Gary Neville dig
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been involved in a number of high-profile rows with Salford co-owner Gary Neville during his time at Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City vs Salford LIVE! FA Cup match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Class of 92 owners will be dreaming of a famous win over Pep Guardiola’s side

arts.ttl: Why Ryan Giggs will be in Salford City's dugout for Man City FA Cup tie
arts.sum: The former Manchester United winger will be in the away dugout for Saturday's fixture, aiding Salford manager Karl Robinson as the League Two outfit attempt to pull off a miraculous upset. Despite being part-owner of fourth-tier Salford, alongside his former 'Class of '92' colleagues, Giggs will be acting as one of the assistants for first-team manager Robinson's on Saturday - a position he has held since October 2024.

arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City welcome Class of 92-owned Salford City to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday (5.45pm) in their FA Cup third round match.

arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly closing in on a deal to make Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush their second addition of the winter transfer window.
